'''Rayno Vaca''' was a [[Tarnab/Legends|Tarnab]] and a member of the [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]]. He piloted an [[Air taxi/Legends|air taxi]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], and took [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]], [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] to [[500 Republica/Legends|500 Republica]].
